explain_query_plan.name: candidate_path_ids_rowid
explain_query_plan.sql: SELECT id FROM path_evidence WHERE rowid >= 1 ORDER BY rowid LIMIT 20

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH path_evidence USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid>?)

explain_query_plan.name: endpoint_batch_lookup
explain_query_plan.sql: SELECT lower(hex(e.entity_hash)) AS entity_hash_hex, name.value AS name, kind.value AS kind FROM entities e LEFT JOIN symbol_dict name ON name.id = e.name_id LEFT JOIN entity_kind_dict kind ON kind.id = e.kind_id WHERE e.entity_hash IN (X'00000000000000000000000000000000')

explain_query_plan.detail: SEARCH name USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?) LEFT-JOIN
SEARCH kind USING INTEGER PRIMARY KEY (rowid=?) LEFT-JOIN

explain_query_plan.name: path_edges_by_path_id
explain_query_plan.sql: SELECT path_id, ordinal, edge_id, head_id, relation, tail_id, source_span_path, exactness, confidence, derived, edge_class, context, provenance_edges_json FROM path_evidence_edges WHERE path_id IN ('path://sample') ORDER BY path_id, ordinal LIMIT 500

explain_query_plan.name: path_rows_by_id
explain_query_plan.sql: SELECT id, source, target, summary, metapath_json, edges_json, source_spans_json, exactness, length, confidence, metadata_json FROM path_evidence WHERE id IN ('path://sample')

index_status.notes: Candidate path IDs are selected before detail loading; path_evidence.id is the logical path_id.
Used to load ordered edge rows for already selected path IDs.
Used by context packet lookup and available for path-centered sampling joins.
Used for file-scoped invalidation and file-centered path audits.
Primary key begins with path_id, test_id; this satisfies path-scoped test lookup.

notes: Classification fields are intentionally blank in markdown for human review.
PathEvidence sampling is bounded: candidate path IDs are selected first, details are batch-loaded only for those IDs, and snippets are loaded only for sampled spans when requested.
Path edge materialization load cap: 500 rows; truncated: false.
Stored PathEvidence samples used before fallback: 20.

manual_review.basis: stored PathEvidence row, ordered materialized edges, snippets, source spans, exactness labels, and provenance metadata
